name: Pannonian Rusyn
notes: Pannonian Rusyn (руски язик) of Vojvodina and Croatia — a West-Slavic-influenced Rusyn variety with its own codified Cyrillic orthography, distinct from Carpathian Rusyn. The grapheme inventory is NOT yet specified: the standard Cyrillic alphabet and its palatalisation conventions have not been verified against the codified grammar (Kostelnik/Ramač), and Wikidata supplies no ISO 639-3 or Glottolog code for this Wikimedia code. Metadata only.
